module1.a: Hierarchy for governance & policy across subscriptions.
Readable IaC, modules, tooling, native to Azure.

module2.a: SAST analyzes code; DAST tests running apps.

module3.a: Correlates signals, raises incidents, enables SOAR.

module4.a: Two environments; switch traffic to minimize downtime.

module5.a: Gradual % traffic shift to validate stability.
